headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Stock Fair Value Edges Lower As Analysts Trim Targets
summary: Lockheed Martin’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly from US$625.16 to US$606.68, signaling a modest reset in the analyst price target framework. This shift lines up with recent research that mixes optimism about execution and long term defense exposure with caution around how much investors may currently be willing to pay for the stock. Read on to see what is behind the updated targets and how to track the next moves in the Lockheed Martin story. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: Did Lockheed’s US$10.5 Billion GLSS2 Win Just Shift Lockheed Martin's (LMT) Investment Narrative?
summary: Earlier this month, U.S. Special Operations Command named Lockheed Martin the prime contractor for its next-generation Global Logistics Support Services II program, a 12-year, roughly US$10.50 billion contract covering worldwide sustainment, maintenance, and life-cycle management for Special Operations Forces. This award reinforces Lockheed Martin’s position at the center of high-complexity defense logistics, extending a relationship that dates back to 2010 and anchoring long-term visibility...

headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Unveils PAC 3 ACE Interceptor For Allied Missile Defense
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) introduced the PAC-3 ACE interceptor, a next-generation missile defense solution positioned for rapid production and allied use. The system is described as a cost-effective option aimed at meeting record global demand for air and missile defense capabilities. The announcement expands Lockheed Martin’s missile defense portfolio at a time when many governments are prioritizing scalable defense systems. For investors tracking Lockheed Martin, the PAC-3 ACE...

headline: Lockheed Martin Reports Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT) today reported second quarter 2026 sales of $20.1 billion, compared to $18.2 billion in the second quarter of 2025. Net earnings in the second quarter of 2026 were $1.8 billion, or $7.94 per share, compared to $342 million, or $1.46 per share, including $1.6 billion of program losses and $169 million of other charges, in the second quarter of 2025. Cash from operations was $3.2 billion in the second quarter of 2026, compared to $201 million in the second q

headline: Lockheed Martin raises full-year outlook after strong second-quarter results (NYSE:LMT)
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) shares surged more than 7% in premarket trading on Thursday after the defence contractor reported second-quarter earnings and revenue above market expectations while raising its full-year financial guidance. The improved outlook was driven by stronger production across the company’s business segments, particularly within its missile programmes, alongside robust cash generation and a record order backlog.

The improved outlook was driven by stronger production across the company’s business segments, particularly within its missile programmes, alongside robust cash generation and a record order backlog.

headline: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) Reports Upbeat Q2 CY2026, Stock Soars
summary: Security and Aerospace company Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) reported Q2 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 10.5% year on year to $20.06 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $80.75 billion at the midpoint came in 2% above analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $7.94 per share was 10.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
